catalogLine: Macanudo Cafe Hyde Park · 5½ × 50 · Robusto · Light · Dominican · $8 · Notes: cream, cedar, light nuts, toast
memberBlurb: The classic mild Connecticut — cream, cedar, and toast in an easy draw. What many shops put in your hand for a first premium smoke.

catalogLine: Arturo Fuente Gran Reserva Rothschild · 4½ × 50 · Rothschild · Medium-Light · Dominican · $7 · Notes: cedar, baking spice, wood, light sweetness
memberBlurb: Fuente craftsmanship in a short, balanced format. Wrapper choice changes the top notes; the core stays smooth Dominican cedar and light spice.
priceNote: Wrapper varies (Natural/Maduro/Cameroon); MSRP for Natural Rothschild.
sizeNote: Line also: Chateau, Cazadores — length/ring vary.

catalogLine: Romeo y Julieta 1875 Churchill · 7 × 47 · Churchill · Medium · Dominican · $9 · Notes: cedar, earth, toasted nuts, light pepper
memberBlurb: Old-school Dominican heritage — cedar, earth, and toasted nuts without harsh edges. A step up from ultra-mild with Cuban-legacy character.

catalogLine: Montecristo White Series Toro · 6 × 54 · Toro · Medium-Light · Dominican · $11 · Notes: cream, cedar, light spice, toast
memberBlurb: Refined Connecticut Shade — cream, almond, and gentle spice in a longer, polished smoke. Morning coffee or an approachable premium afternoon.

catalogLine: La Flor Dominicana Double Ligero Chisel · 6 × 54 · Chisel · Full · Dominican · $13 · Notes: red pepper, leather, charred oak, earth
memberBlurb: Dominican ligero with real teeth — red pepper, leather, and coffee. Experienced smokers only; not the mild DR stereotype.

catalogLine: Arturo Fuente Fuente Fuente Opus X Perfecxion X · 5¼ × 42 · Petite Corona · Full · Dominican · $32 · Notes: cedar, baking spice, leather, sweet tobacco
memberBlurb: The Dominican puro that changed the conversation — sun-grown wrapper spice, cedar, dried fruit, and collector prestige. Block 90 minutes.
priceNote: Line has many vitolas; MSRP for Petite Corona class; larger formats $40+.
sizeNote: Many vitolas; listed size is Petite Corona class. Toro/Robusto larger.

catalogLine: Ashton ESG Churchill · 7¼ × 52 · Churchill · Full · Dominican · $18 · Notes: graham cracker, cedar, cocoa, molasses
memberBlurb: Fuente-made estate sun-grown richness — graham, molasses, and cedar with the “velvet hammer” reputation. Celebration smoke, not a yard-gar.
sizeNote: Line also: Robusto, Toro — ring/length vary.

catalogLine: Arturo Fuente Hemingway Short Story · 4 × 49 · Figurado · Medium · Dominican · $8 · Notes: cedar, brown sugar, baking spice, toast
memberBlurb: Cameroon sweetness and Fuente figurado skill in a short window. Brown sugar, baking spice, and cedar — craftsmanship you can finish before dessert.
priceNote: Figurado family; Short Story MSRP; Signature/Churchill higher.
sizeNote: Figurado family: Signature, Churchill, etc. — length varies.

catalogLine: Ashton Classic Magnum · 7 × 50 · Magnum · Medium-Light · Dominican · $11 · Notes: cream, cedar, almonds, toast
memberBlurb: Polished Dominican Connecticut — cream, almonds, and reliable mild-to-medium body. Beginner-safe premium without boring you.
sizeNote: Several sizes; Magnum is representative long smoke.

catalogLine: Montecristo Classic / Dominican Toro · 6 × 52 · Toro · Light · Dominican · $9 · Notes: cream, cedar, nuts, grassy sweetness
memberBlurb: The name everyone recognizes — grassy sweetness, cream, and mild Cuban-legacy vibes. Broad appeal for new and returning smokers.
priceNote: Dominican Classic line; vitola varies by SKU.
sizeNote: Classic line has multiple vitolas; Toro listed.

catalogLine: Davidoff Aniversario Churchill · 7 × 50 · Churchill · Medium-Light · Dominican · $28 · Notes: cedar, nuts, cream, coffee
memberBlurb: Davidoff elegance without punching you in the chest — nuts, cream, and coffee-with-cream in refined construction. Prestige that stays gentle.
sizeNote: Aniversario line — Churchill representative; other sizes available.

catalogLine: Cohiba Dominican / Red Dot Robusto · 5 × 50 · Robusto · Medium · Dominican · $14 · Notes: cedar, cream, black pepper, wood
memberBlurb: Cameroon texture and Dominican Piloto body — cedar, cream, and black pepper. Heritage prestige without OpusX money (U.S.-legal DR Cohiba).
priceNote: Dominican Red Dot; not island Cuban.
sizeNote: Red Dot line — multiple vitolas; Robusto representative.

catalogLine: Padron 2000 · 5½ × 50 · Robusto · Medium · Nicaragua · $9 · Notes: cocoa, coffee, earth, nuts
memberBlurb: The daily Padron lesson — all-Nicaraguan cocoa, coffee, and earth in honest construction. Natural vs maduro is your sweetness dial.

catalogLine: Oliva Serie V Double Robusto · 6 × 54 · Double Robusto · Full · Nicaragua · $11 · Notes: sweet spice, espresso, dark cocoa, cedar
memberBlurb: Jalapa/Estelí power with oily habano sweetness — espresso, pepper, and dark cocoa. Full Nicaraguan intensity that still finishes sweet.

catalogLine: My Father Le Bijou 1922 Toro · 6 × 52 · Toro · Full · Nicaragua · $13 · Notes: dark cocoa, espresso, leather, black pepper
memberBlurb: Garcia family dark maduro — espresso, leather, and pepper in an oscuro wrapper. Winter-night Nicaraguan without Liga hype.

catalogLine: Foundation Cigar Company The Tabernacle CT Broadleaf Robusto · 5 × 52 · Robusto · Full · Nicaragua · $13 · Notes: dark cocoa, espresso, leather, earth
memberBlurb: Broadleaf done with boutique intent — dark cocoa, leather, and fermented sweetness. For smokers who want texture, not just strength.

catalogLine: Dunbarton Tobacco & Trust Sin Compromiso No. 2 · 6 × 52 · Toro · Medium-Full · Nicaragua · $15 · Notes: hot cocoa, leather, cream, earth
memberBlurb: Saka’s savory San Andrés maduro — hot cocoa, chicory, and earth in a balanced, no-compromise blend. Rich without being a nicotine bomb.
sizeNote: Line also: No. 5, Seleccion — dimensions vary.

catalogLine: Drew Estate Liga Privada No. 9 Robusto · 5 × 52 · Robusto · Full · Nicaragua · $13 · Notes: dark chocolate, espresso, earth, leather
memberBlurb: The private-blend reference — broadleaf chocolate, espresso, and earthy depth people chase. Benchmark dark smoke for bourbon nights.

catalogLine: Padron 60th Anniversary · 6 × 52 · Perfecto · Full · Nicaragua · $45 · Notes: malted milk, cafe au lait, chocolate, cocoa
memberBlurb: 2025 Cigar of the Year — Padron anniversary perfecto with malted milk, cafe au lait, and chocolate in a Nicaraguan puro. Collector occasion.

catalogLine: The Cohiba Ambar · 5¼ × 53 · Ambar · Medium-Full · Cuban · — · Notes: oak, caramel, almond, cream
memberBlurb: CA 2025 #2 — barrel-fermented Cohiba in the new 53-ring Ambar size. Oak and caramel core, creamy almond, elegant fruit finish; pigtail cap nods to the original Lancero.
priceNote: Island Cuban; not U.S. retail MSRP. UK reference ~£75/stick (~$95) for prestige context only.

catalogLine: Tatuaje Black · 6 × 38 · Petite Lancero · Medium · Nicaragua · $11 · Notes: smores, campfire sweetness, oak, tannin
memberBlurb: Big flavor in a slim ring — campfire smores, oak, and Tatuaje intensity when you only have 45 minutes. Boutique density over size.

catalogLine: Cuesta-Rey Centro Fino Sungrown Pyramid No. 9 · 6½ × 52 · Pyramid · Medium-Full · Dominican · $12 · Notes: sweet spice, cedar, toasted tobacco, earth
memberBlurb: Fuente-made Dominican with Ecuador sungrown lift — sweeter spice and cedar in a pyramid that smokes richer than a mild Connecticut.

catalogLine: Trinidad Espiritu Series No. 3 · 6 × 52 · Belicoso · Medium-Full · Nicaragua · $14 · Notes: dark sweetness, earth, spice, cocoa
memberBlurb: Modern Trinidad revival — Mexican wrapper depth over Nicaraguan spice in a belicoso. Legacy name, contemporary body.

catalogLine: Rocky Patel Emerald · 5 × 50 · Robusto · Medium · Nicaragua · $12 · Notes: cream, spice, wood, toasted nuts
memberBlurb: Polished box-pressed robusto — cream, wood, and spice without the usual heavy-handed RP punch. Accessible modern construction.

catalogLine: A.J. Fernandez Nasser The Goat · 6 × 52 · Toro · Medium-Full · Nicaragua · $14 · Notes: cocoa, earth, pepper, dark sweetness
memberBlurb: A.J. Fernandez dark power with San Andrés wrapper — cocoa, earth, and pepper plus a story-driven release. Bold after-dinner Nicaraguan.

catalogLine: Diplomaticos Genios Exclusivo Phoenicia · 6 × 52 · Genios · Full · Cuban · — · Notes: wood, cedar, earth, spice
memberBlurb: Cuban regional-edition rarity — wood, cedar, and assertive island character. Recommend when collector Cuban identity is the point.
priceNote: Cuban regional edition; not U.S. retail MSRP.

catalogLine: Arturo Fuente Fuente Fuente OpusX Angel's Share Reserva d'Chateau · 7 × 48 · Churchill · Medium-Full · Dominican · $35 · Notes: cedar, baking spice, fruit, cream
memberBlurb: Angel’s Share OpusX refinement — cedar, fruit, and baking spice with medium-full Opus prestige. For Fuente fans who don’t want max strength.

catalogLine: Ferio Tego Timeless Supreme 650 · 6 × 50 · Toro · Medium-Full · Nicaragua · $14 · Notes: sweet spice, cedar, cocoa, earth
memberBlurb: Plasencia-made boutique Nicaraguan puro — sweet spice, cedar, and polished modern richness. Newer brand with Top 25 credibility.
